caption: 一卷就这张好。
scene: Sage sitting in a reading chair at night hunched over a laptop showing a single small photo frame on screen, a thin strip of film negatives draped over one arm of the chair, mouth a faint satisfied curve, a tiny crescent moon in a small window behind
bible_hook: §7 small wins: the one good photo from a whole roll (§6 Sage scanned a roll of film Monday)
rationale: Anchors to Sage's street-photography hobby and the film-scan continuity, a side of him untouched recently; differs from the work/coffee/balcony posts by spotlighting a quiet creative win after a long day, and avoids all recent motifs (no coffee, basil, AirPod, gym, snack run).
